name: github-webhook-verify
description: Verify a GitHub webhook signature. Reads the X-Hub-Signature-256 header and HMAC-verifies it against `ctx.request.rawBody` using the GITHUB_WEBHOOK_SECRET env var. v0.6 — verifies against the BYTES GitHub signed (`ctx.request.rawBody` is captured by HttpTrigger before JSON parsing). Pre-v0.6 used `JSON.stringify(ctx.request.body)` — a fragile round-trip that broke on whitespace + key-order differences; worked for GitHub's canonical JSON encoding but failed Stripe / Slack / any provider that signs the wire bytes. Same middleware shape now handles all three: point `payload` at `ctx.request.rawBody`. On match, falls through; on mismatch (or missing signature), throws GlobalError(401) with a structured `reason` discriminator that the catch arm / Studio can branch on.
